IS_EMAIL: Must be a valid email address
MIN: Must be greater than or equal to {constraint1}
MAX: Must be less than or equal to {constraint1}
MIN_LENGTH: Must be at least {constraint1} characters long
MAX_LENGTH: Must be at most {constraint1} characters long
LENGTH: Must be between {constraint1} and {constraint2} characters long
IS_PHONE: Must be a valid phone number
IS_MOBILE_PHONE: Must be a valid mobile phone number
NOT_MANY_EXISTS: One or more records do not exist
IS_MILITARY_TIME: Must be a valid time in HH:mm (24h) format
MIN_DAY: Must be greater than or equal to {constraint1}
MAX_DAY: Must be less than or equal to {constraint1}
IS_AFTER_START_DATE: End date must be after start date
MAX_FILE_SIZE: File size must be less than {constraint1}
